From: SBS Chartering Dubai <chartering.dubai@stanbulk.com> 
Sent: 01 December 2025 10:52
To: SBS Chartering Dubai <chartering.dubai@stanbulk.com>
Subject: ALSIC I 15,000mt Calcined Petcoke / Green Raw Petcoke in bulk -
Ruwais, UAE / Jebel Ali (and/or) Khalifa | Laycan : 04-09 Dec '25
 
KA : Chartering Desk
Good Day!
 
Please indicate / offer firm for below close order :
 
*** Still Open ***
 
A/C - ALS International Ship Chartering Limited Abu Dhabi *(ALSIC)*
Cargo & Quantity : 15,000mt 10% Moloo Calcined Petcoke / Green Raw Petcoke
in bulk 
Load port : 1-2 sbs Ruwais, UAE
Discharge port (CHOPT): (in case of 2 disports -port rotation in charterers'
option) 
1-2 sbs Jebel Ali, UAE
(and/or)
1-2 sbs Khalifa, UAE
Load Rate : 5,000 mt pwwd of 24 consecutive hours shinc with exceptions on
laytime to apply as per cp
Disch Rate : 5,000 mt per crane/pwwdwp of 24 consecutive hours, shinc, basis
minimum 4 cranes & minimum 5 holds working simultaneously, prorate if less
exceptions on laytime to apply as per cp
Laycan : 04-09 Dec '25
2.5% add + 1.25% Standard Bulk Shipbrokers
 
Otherwise as per charterers' terms/conditions (non-negotiable)...
 
Note :-
 
-- Vessel max loa 170 meters 
-- G A should always provide:
-- Height of the cranes / air draft from top of the crane
-- Distance of crane from mid structure to railings
-- Latest aerial photos of vessel upper deck from port side and starboard
side
-- Updated Q88 / Baltic Q
 
Refer check list highlighted below for loading loggers at Ruwais which is to
be confirmed and complied by the vessel/master on arrival load port Ruwais.
 
The maximum WL to Main deck should not exceed 6.80 meters, after ballasting
No.3 Hold and filling all other ballast tanks. Therefore, it is crucial for
the vessel to arrive at the CBDC terminal with full ballast and No.3 Cargo
Hold (ballast hold) full, The distance from the waterline to the timber
stanchions (fixed) should be Less than at No.1 hold at 15.45 meters, No.3
hold at 15.19 meters, and No.5 hold at 15.10 meters. The vessel's arrival
drafts should be around f/6.30 meters and A/6.80 meters, with a stern trim
of 0.50 meters.
 
Cargo of 15000MT can be distributed between No 2/4 and 5 hold and pump out
ballast after departure from Ruwais (summer drafts permitting
 
++
 
Pleased to hear.
 
Thanks & Best Regards 
-
Abdul Rahman
 
As Brokers Only
Standard Bulk Shipbrokers LLC
